changelog: v3.5.83 - Hosting detay: WiseCP Panel API entegre (DirectAdmin/cPanel/Plesk)

ac-product-hosting.php: 872 satir (yine JS YOK, CSS-only tab)

- Akilli ikon eslestirme: panel turune gore farkli icon
